title: cycas curranii
intro: Cycas curranii, also known as Curran's cycad, is a species of cycad that belongs to the family Cycadaceae. It is native to the Philippines and has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and promoting wound healing, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. In traditional herbal preparations, Cycas curranii is often used in the form of decoctions, infusions, or poultices to harness its medicinal properties.
